question: Will MNX hire a backend developer before Manifest?
textDescription:
I'm looking for an experienced backend engineer to help me build a high-performance, off-chain orderbook, on-chain settlement, derivatives exchange. Tasks include building on-chain liquidity vault and settlement contracts, and a high-performance matching engine. We'll have equity and compute perps, and AI-focused prediction markets. Competitive salary + equity. Ideally based in the bay area.


More on MNX: https://x.com/MNX_fi/status/2024215098357887404

site: mnx.fi

DM me with your background and the coolest thing you've built!
